summary: Creative Prints 3D printing storefront with product listings, shopping cart, order management, and an admin panel. Admin access is tied to Internet Identity linked to lanepeevy@gmail.com, allowing product management and order handling. The Creative Prints logo is displayed in the header.
architectural_notes: Authentication uses Internet Identity (no traditional email/password login); admin access is granted to the account linked to lanepeevy@gmail.com
Admin panel allows adding/managing products and handling orders

existing_features.title: Retain all existing storefront features: product listings on the store page, shopping cart, checkout flow with payment proof upload, order success page, gallery page, custom order form, and home/landing page — exactly as previously implemented.

Grant admin access exclusively to the Internet Identity account associated with lanepeevy@gmail.com. This account must be able to access the admin dashboard to add/edit/delete products, view and update orders, manage gallery items, and review payment confirmations.
Display the Creative Prints logo in the site header consistently across all pages.
